title: Proclamation No. 784, s. 1941
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 784

RESERVING FOR DEVELOPMENT, CULTIVATION AND FOR OTHER PURPOSES A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE BARRIO OF LASANG, MUNICIPALITY OF TAGUM, PROVINCE OF DAVAO, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce and pursuant to the provisions of section eighty-three of Commonwealth Act Numbered One hundred and forty-one, as amended, I hereby reserve for development, cultivation and for other purposes, under the administration of the National Land Settlement Administration, subject to private rights, if any there be, and to the rights that might have been acquired by the De Leon Farm, Inc., under .Sales Application (New) filed on March twenty-sixth, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and Eligio Lagman under Sales Application (New) filed on February third, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and to the further condition that the timber and other forest products therein shall be placed under the administration and control of the Bureau of Forestry in accordance with the Forest Law and Regulations, the following-described parcel of the public domain, situated in the barrio of Lasang municipality of Tagum, Province of Davao, Island of Mindanao, and particularly described on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16981, to wit:

Lot No. 4851, Swo-16981. —Beginning at a point marked 1 on Bureau of Lands plan Swo-16981, S. 57° 52′ W. 148.04 m., more or less, from B. B. M. No. 17, thence west 131.00 m. to point 2; west 129.00 m . to point 3; west 200.75 m. to point 4; west 133.25 m. to point 5; west 250.00 m. to point 6; west 250.00 m. to point 7; west 180.00 m. to point 8; west 177.48 m. to point 9; west 149,52 m. to point 10; west 250.00 m. to point 11; N. 89° 50′ W. 60.52 m. to point 12; N. 89° 59′ W. 200.13 m . to point 13; S. 89° 57′ W. 247.35 m. to point 14; west 139.01 m. to point 15; west 249.99 m. to point 16; west 96.10 m. to point 17; north 400.45 m. to point 18; ‘north 400.42 m. to point 19; N. 0° 01′ E. 400.36 m. to point 20; N. 0° 08′ E. 403.21 m. to point 21; N. 0° 07′ E. 396.67 m. to point 22; S. 89° 52′ E. 399.21 m. to point 23; S. 89° 56′ E. 399.86 m. to point 24; S. 89° 49′ S. 399.88 m. to point 25; S. 89° 53′ E. 400.09 m. to point 26; N. 89° 31′ E. 396.87 m. to point 27; S. 89° 30′ E. 403.84 m. to point 28; 88° 50′ E. 300.03 m. to point 29; S. 63° 58′ E. 261.56 m to point 30; S. 3° 09′ W. 148.24 m. to point 31; S. 6° 24′ W. 207.35 m. to point 32; S. 2° 36′ W. 51.02 m. to point 33; S. 1° 22′ W. 201.11 m. to point 34; E. 1° 21′ W. 208.45 m. to point 35; S. 1° 36′ W. 262.83 m. to point 36; S. 6° 53′ W. 207.65 m. to point 37; S. 1° 25′ W. 236.63 m. to point 38; S. 36° 27′ E. 118.64 m. to point 39; S. 4° 13′ E. 14.94 m. to point 40; S. 4° 35′ W. 219.62 m. to point 41; S. 67° 19’ W. 70.70 m. to point 1, point of beginning.

Containing an area of five million seven hundred seventy-seven thousand two hundred thirty-nine square meters, (5,777,239) more or less.

Bounded on the north by property of Davao Penal Colony (portion of lot No. 4710) ; on the northeast, by national highway; on the east, by lots Nos. 1919, 1921, 1932, 1933, 3143, road, and lot No. 3132; on the south, by lots Nos. 2552, 2551, 1712, 1764, 1713, 1717, 4167, and 1729; and on the west, by lot No. 4850.

Bearings true. Declination, 2° 07′ E.

Points referred to are marked on Bureau of Lands plan Swo – 16981.

Surveyed: November 4, 1940, to December 31, 1940.

Approved: …………………………………….

NOTE:—Lot No. 4851 is a portion of lot No. 4710 of Tagum cadastre.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this twenty-sixth day of November, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty-one, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the seventh.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Legislative Library, House of Representatives
